name: Booters
description:
Booters is restaurant-bar franchise based on Hooters brand with difference that is based around ballbusting and generally testicles getting hurt by womans working there in one way or another.

Ballbusting pratices are seen in same way as any normal product sold in places like this, due to fact that in this reality sex, nudity and all stuff like that is seen as completly normal every day ocuring thing by public and peoples.

They do sell food and drinks too like normal bar ok.
